retrieved_result: FAQs About Work & Life at SFS FAQs About Work & Life at SFSWhat are your school start and end dates? Our school year must include 180 teaching days and ten faculty days for a total of 190, usually beginning in mid-August and ending in mid-June. Holidays include the Korean national holidays, three weeks at Christmas, a week at Lu
